name: fr24

metadata.name: fr24
metadata.summary: Parse gRPC and JSON data from FlightRadar24

documentation:
# fr24

fr24 is a library for downloading data from [Flightradar24](https://flightradar24.com) using [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/PROTOCOL-HTTP2.md) and JSON.

It supports querying live feed snapshots/playback, trajectory history and other miscellaneous metadata.

Please see the [documentation](https://cathaypacific8747.github.io/fr24/) for detailed usage guides. 

## Installation and Usage

For the latest stable version:

```sh
pip install fr24
```

For a development version, clone the repository and run in the directory:
```sh
pip install .
```

## License

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Code has been developed for educational purposes ONLY. Do not abuse it.

```json
{
  "copyright": "Copyright (c) 2014-2023 Flightradar24 AB. All rights reserved.",
  "legalNotice": "The contents of this file and all derived data are the property of Flightradar24 AB for use exclusively by its products and applications. Using, modifying or redistributing the data without the prior written permission of Flightradar24 AB is not allowed and may result in prosecutions."
}
```

class_variables.name: fr24.types.playback.TrackData.heading
documentation:
!!! warning
    The JSON response claims that `heading` is available, but ADS-B only
    transmits the [ground track](https://mode-s.org/decode/content/ads-b/4-surface-position.html#ground-track).
    [Heading](https://mode-s.org/decode/content/mode-s/7-ehs.html#heading-and-speed-report-bds-60)
    is only available in [EMS][fr24.types.playback.EMS] data.

    This field is renamed to `track` to avoid confusion in
    [fr24.json.playback_track_dict][].

functions.name: fr24.common.to_unix_timestamp
documentation:
Casts timestamp-like object to Unix timestamp,
returning `None` if `timestamp` is `None`.

modules.name: fr24.static.bbox
documentation:
live feed will only return 1500 flights per bounding box:
idea is to cut the world in vertical slices and collect them

however, since an airspace is congested in different times of the day,
a static bounding box will require many subdivisions to not exceed this limit.

instead, we should use a dynamic bounding box that will change every 30 minutes
to reduce the number of requests

variables.name: fr24.static.bbox.lng_bounds
documentation: default static bounds

variables.name: fr24.static.bbox.lng_bounds_per_30_min
documentation:
dynamic bounds every 30 minutes, 0 = 00:00UTC
this is tuned on 2023-06-15: each slice should contain 1000 flights.

modules.name: fr24.grpc
documentation:
Endpoint: https://data-feed.flightradar24.com

Service name: fr24.feed.api.v1.Feed

Methods:

- `LiveFeed`
- `Playback`
- `NearestFlights`
- `LiveFlightsStatus`
- `FollowFlight`
- `TopFlights`
- `LiveTrail`

functions.name: fr24.grpc.live_feed_message_create
documentation:
Create the LiveFeedRequest protobuf message

```
param north

North latitude (degrees)

param south

South latitude (degrees)

param west

West longitude (degrees)

param east

East longitude (degrees)

param stats

Include stats of the given area

param limit

Max number of flights (default 1500 for unauthenticated users,
2000 for authenticated users)

param maxage

Max age since last update, seconds

param fields

fields to include - for unauthenticated users, max 4 fields.
When authenticated, , , ,  and 
can be included
```

functions.name: fr24.grpc.live_feed_playback_message_create
documentation:
Create the live feed playback request protobuf message.

```
param timestamp

Start timestamp

param prefetch

End timestamp: should be start timestamp + 7 seconds

param hfreq

High frequency mode
```

functions.name: fr24.json.flight_list
documentation:
Fetch metadata/history of flights for a given aircraft or flight number.

Includes basic information such as status, O/D, scheduled/estimated/real
times: see [fr24.types.flight_list.FlightList][] for more details.

Use *either* `reg` or `flight` to query.
To determine if there are more pages to query, check the response
[.result.response.page.more][fr24.types.flight_list.Page.more].

```
param client

HTTPX async client

param reg

Aircraft registration (e.g. )

param flight

Flight number (e.g. )

param page

Page number

param limit

Number of results per page - use  if authenticated.

param timestamp

Show flights with ATD before this Unix timestamp

param auth

Authentication data
```

functions.name: fr24.json.airport_list
documentation:
Fetch aircraft arriving, departing or on ground at a given airport.

Returns on ground/scheduled/estimated/real times: see
[fr24.types.flight_list.FlightListItem][] for more details.

```
param client

HTTPX async client

param airport

IATA airport code (e.g. )

param mode

arrivals, departures or on ground aircraft

param page

Page number

param limit

Number of results per page (max 100)

param timestamp

Show flights with STA before this Unix timestamp

param auth

Authentication data
```

functions.name: fr24.json.playback
documentation:
Fetch historical track playback data for a given flight.

```
param client

HTTPX async client

param flight_id

fr24 hex flight id

param timestamp

Unix timestamp (seconds) of ATD - optional, but
```

it is recommended to include it
\:param auth: Authentication data

functions.name: fr24.json.find
documentation:
General search.
\:param query: Airport, schedule (HKG-CDG), or aircraft.

functions.name: fr24.json.playback_metadata_dict
documentation:
Flatten and rename important variables in the flight metadata to a
dictionary.

functions.name: fr24.json.playback_track_dict
documentation:
Flatten and rename each variable in this observation into a new dictionary.

!!! note
    The JSON response claims that `heading` is available, but ADS-B only
    transmits the [ground track](https://mode-s.org/decode/content/ads-b/4-surface-position.html#ground-track).
    [Heading](https://mode-s.org/decode/content/mode-s/7-ehs.html#heading-and-speed-report-bds-60)
    is only available in [EMS][fr24.types.playback.EMS] data.

    We rename it to `track` to avoid confusion.

functions.name: fr24.json.playback_track_ems_dict
documentation:
If the Enhanced Mode-S data is available in this observation,
flatten and rename each variable to a dictionary. Otherwise, return `None`.

functions.name: fr24.json.playback_arrow
documentation:
Parse each [fr24.types.playback.TrackData][] in the API response into a
pyarrow.Table. Also adds [fr24.types.playback.FlightData][] into the
schema's metadata with key `_flight`.

If the response is empty, a warning is logged and an empty table is returned

functions.name: fr24.json.playback_df
documentation:
Parse each [fr24.types.playback.TrackData][] in the API response into a
pandas DataFrame. Also adds [fr24.types.playback.FlightData][] into the
DataFrame's `.attrs`.

If the response is empty, a warning is logged and an empty table is returned

functions.name: fr24.json.flight_list_dict
documentation: Flatten a flight entry into dict, converting fr24 hex ids into integers.

functions.name: fr24.json.flight_list_arrow
documentation:
Parse each [fr24.types.flight_list.FlightListItem][] in the API response
into a pyarrow.Table.

If the response is empty, a warning is logged and an empty table is returned

functions.name: fr24.json.flight_list_df
documentation:
Parse each [fr24.types.flight_list.FlightListItem][] in the API response
into a pandas DataFrame.

If the response is empty, a warning is logged and an empty table is returned

methods.name: fr24.core.FlightListArrow.concat
documentation:
Returns a new list of flights merged with the current table.
Duplicates are removed from the current table, which results in
all `Estimated` flights to be updated with the new data (if any).

```
param inplace

If , the current table will be updated in place.
```

e.g. `./tmp/foo.parquet`, `sys.stdout.buffer`.

```
param fp

File path to save the table to. If , the table will
be saved to the appropriate cache directory.

raises ValueError

If a format other than  is provided when
saving to cache.
```
A wrapper around a pyarrow.Table containing flight list data.

classes.name: fr24.core.FlightListService

methods.name: fr24.core.FlightListService.fetch
documentation:
Fetch one page of flight list for the given registration or
flight number.

*Related: [fr24.json.flight_list][]*

Input **either** the registration or the flight number, not both.

```
param reg

Aircraft registration (e.g. )

param flight

Flight number (e.g. )

param limit

Number of flights per page - use  if authenticated

param timestamp

Show flights with ATD before this Unix timestamp
```

documentation:

registration or flight number.

*Related: [fr24.json.flight_list][]*

Input **either** the registration or the flight number, not both.

```
param reg

Aircraft registration (e.g. )

param flight

param limit

param timestamp

Show flights with ATD before this Unix timestamp

param delay

Delay between requests in seconds
```

an empty table will be returned.

Input **either** the registration or the flight number, not both.
A service to handle the flight list API and file operations.

classes.name: fr24.core.LiveFeedService

methods.name: fr24.core.LiveFeedService.fetch
documentation:
Fetch live feed data.

*Related: [fr24.grpc.live_feed_world_data][]*

```
param timestamp

Unix timestamp (seconds) of the live feed data.
If , the latest live data will be fetched. Otherwise,
historical data will be fetched instead.

param duration

Prefetch duration (default:  seconds). Should only
be set for historical data.

param hfreq

High frequency mode (default: ). Should only be set
for historical data.

param limit

Max number of flights (default 1500 for unauthenticated
users, 2000 for authenticated users)

param fields

fields to include - for unauthenticated users, max 4
fields. When authenticated, , , ,
 and  can be included
```

methods.name: fr24.core.LiveFeedService.load
documentation:
Get live feed data from the
\[cache\](../usage/cli.md#directories). If the file does not exist,
an empty table will be returned.

```
param timestamp

Unix timestamp (seconds) of the saved feed snapshot.
```
A service to handle the live feed API and file operations.

classes.name: fr24.tui.tui.FR24

class_variables.name: fr24.tui.tui.FR24.line_info
documentation: noqa: RUF012
-- Application --

functions.name: fr24.authentication.get_credentials
documentation:
Reads credentials from the environment variables, overriding it with
the config file if it exists.

functions.name: fr24.authentication.login
documentation:
Read credentials and logs into the API.

By default, credentials are read from the environment variables or the
config file if `creds_override` is not set. Then, if the credentials:
- `username` and `password` is set: makes a POST request to the login
endpoint
- `subscription_key` and `token` is set: returns immediately
- otherwise, `None` is returned

functions.name: fr24.authentication.login_with_username_password
documentation:
Retrieve bearer token and subscription key from the API.

Bearer: `json['userData']['accessToken']`
`token=` query param: `json['userData']['subscriptionKey']`

functions.name: fr24.authentication.login_with_token_subscription_key
documentation:
Login with subscription key and/or token.
Falls back to anonymous access if token is expired or invalid.
